---
title: 'Urban case studies: General discussion'
date: '2016-01-01'
author:
- W. Brune
- W. Bloss
- Z. Shi
- F. Pope
- G. Fuller
- P.S. Monks
- A. Tomlin
- T. Karl
- M. Hort
- C. Mohr
- R. Mackenzie
- A. Vlachou
- Z. Tian
- L.J. Kramer
- D. Heard
- R. Purvis
- X. Querol
- U. Baltensperger
- R. Dunmore
- R. Harrison
- T. Murrells
- J.L. Jimenez
- E. Cross
- G. McFiggans
- A. Kiendler-Scharr
- T.-R. Ho
- A. Charron
- T. Wallington
- N. Krishna Kumar
- S. Pieber
- F. Geiger
- A. Wahner
- E. Mitchell
- A. Prévôt
- A. Skouloudis
- M. Kalberer
- B. McDonald
- C.N. Hewitt
- C. Sioutas
- N.M. Donahue
- J. Lee
- D. Van Pinxteren
- S. Moller
- M.C. Minguillón
- M. Shafer
- D. Carslaw
- C. Ehlers
- S. Pandis
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Faraday Discussions*'
---

## Urban case studies: General discussion

<p class="pub-meta">W. Brune, W. Bloss, Z. Shi, F. Pope, G. Fuller, P.S. Monks, A. Tomlin, T. Karl, M. Hort, C. Mohr, R. Mackenzie, A. Vlachou, Z. Tian, L.J. Kramer, D. Heard, R. Purvis, X. Querol, U. Baltensperger, R. Dunmore, R. Harrison, T. Murrells, J.L. Jimenez, E. Cross, G. McFiggans, A. Kiendler-Scharr, T.-R. Ho, A. Charron, T. Wallington, N. Krishna Kumar, S. Pieber, F. Geiger, A. Wahner, E. Mitchell, A. Prévôt, A. Skouloudis, M. Kalberer, B. McDonald, C.N. Hewitt, C. Sioutas, N.M. Donahue, J. Lee, D. Van Pinxteren, S. Moller, M.C. Minguillón, M. Shafer, D. Carslaw, C. Ehlers, S. Pandis</p>

_*Faraday Discussions*_, 2016


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2016-d.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
